title: Aerospace & EV Engineering Mindset
activities: Understand aerospace engineering standards (AS 9100, DO-178C basics)
Learn EV battery fundamentals: chemistry, BMS, lifecycle, safety
Study Battery Pack Aadhaar System product vision
Study Battery Cybersecurity Platform product vision
Review internship code of conduct, tooling, and communication norms
Setup development environment: Python, Git, VS Code, Streamlit

title: Deep System Analysis
activities: Detailed analysis of assigned simulator requirements
System analysis: inputs, outputs, data flow, dependencies
Use case analysis: identify all user interactions
Test case analysis: define test scenarios before development
Data analysis: understand battery data schemas and standards
Create initial data model and entity-relationship diagram
Submit Week 1 analysis document to Google Drive

title: Simulator Development
activities: Implement core simulator logic in Python
Create CLI interface with argparse or click
Implement JSON input/output with Pydantic validation
Build Streamlit UI: input form, run button, output dashboard
Implement FastAPI REST endpoints: /simulate, /health, /sample
Write unit tests with pytest
Tag all outputs with simulated=true and run metadata

title: Simulator QA & Hardening
activities: Run complete test suite and fix all failing tests
Test negative and edge cases: invalid input, missing fields, extremes
Peer code review with another intern
Fix bugs found during QA
Improve Streamlit UI: charts, export, evidence screenshot
Complete README and API documentation
Upload evidence to Google Drive and submit for QA review

title: Product POC Development
activities: Define POC scope for assigned user story
Implement minimum viable product for the user story
Integrate simulator output with POC backend
Create basic UI for the POC
Demonstrate end-to-end flow for the user story
Document POC findings and limitations
Submit POC demo video and screenshots

title: Architecture & Design
activities: Design formal system architecture for the product story
Create component diagram and data flow diagram
Define API contracts (request/response JSON schemas)
Write architecture decision records (ADRs)
Create sequence diagrams for key flows
Design security controls and threat mitigations
Submit architecture document for architect review

title: Product Development — Phase 1
activities: Implement backend APIs per the API contract
Implement data models and database schema
Implement core business logic for the user story
Integrate with assigned simulator
Create integration test stubs
Maintain feature branch with clean commits
Daily standup updates in team channel

title: Product Development — Phase 2 & Unit Tests
activities: Complete remaining product features
Implement full UI per UI requirements
Write unit tests for all business logic functions
Achieve minimum 70% code coverage
Fix any regressions from integration
Update README and inline documentation
Create pull request for architect review

title: Cross Testing & QA
activities: Cross-test with other developers' simulators and APIs
Run integration test harness (SIM-010) across all simulators
File bug reports for issues found in peer testing
Fix critical and high severity bugs in own code
Conduct security checklist review
Submit QA evidence package: test report, coverage, screenshots
Formal QA review session with QA reviewer

title: Bug Fixes, Optimisation & Demo Hardening
activities: Fix all open bugs from QA review
Optimise simulator performance for demo loads
Improve UI polish and responsiveness
Prepare demo script and rehearse flow
Record demo video (5-10 minutes)
Create demo presentation slides
Update Google Drive evidence folder with all artifacts

title: Research, Patent Notes & Presentations
activities: Write research summary: novel contributions of the work
Document potential patent-worthy concepts
Prepare presentation for EV Society review
Peer review each other's presentations
Submit research notes and patent notes to Google Drive
Update user story page with final evidence links
Architect review of final deliverable

title: Final Verification & Documentation
activities: Complete all manual verification steps from story checklist
Ensure Definition of Done checklist is fully checked
Submit final verification report
Complete security review checklist
Finalize all documentation: README, API docs, architecture doc
Submit release notes for final version
Architect final sign-off review

title: Final Demo & EV Society Review
activities: Final demo rehearsal with all interns
Present to EV Society review panel
Demo Battery Pack Aadhaar System features
Demo Battery Cybersecurity Platform features
Q&A with EV Society panel
Receive feedback and log action items
Confirm certificate eligibility

title: Final Review & Certificate Distribution
activities: Founder / Architect final review of all deliverables
Close all open action items from EV Society review
Final retrospective: what went well, what to improve
Certificate distribution to eligible interns
Archive all evidence to Google Drive
Close GitHub repositories and tag final release
